text: Here in this modern, almost sterile setting, I feel a curious juxtaposition between the passion of curiosity and the cool detachment of research. The glass walls and bold colors evoke a sense of clarity and innovation, yet I am also aware of the boundaries and separations—between observer and observed, creation and contemplation. In the midst of technological displays and intellectual showcases, I feel both invigorated by human ingenuity and made small by the vast machinery of progress. There is excitement, but also a faint loneliness in this orderly pursuit of knowledge.
